display.purpose: Page titles and emotional headlines only.

body.purpose: UI copy, descriptions, chat, diary content.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for color and opacity transitions.

motion.name: ease-drift
motion.purpose: Fluid hover and card lift transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8a860 0%, #b85a38 100%); color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.7rem 1.15rem; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(240, 159, 85, 0.25); transition: transform 360ms cubic-bezier(0.37, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 360ms cubic-bezier(0.37, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(255, 179, 71, 0.38); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8a860; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action on dark warm surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: rgba(45, 35, 28, 0.72); color: #fff9f0; border: 1.5px solid rgba(232, 168, 96, 0.16); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0.7rem 1.15rem; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); transition: transform 360ms cubic-bezier(0.37, 0, 0.2, 1), background 360ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: rgba(58, 44, 34, 0.88); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e8a860; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Default content container with warm blur.
components.html:
Tonight

Write slowly. The lamp glows with you.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(45, 35, 28, 0.82); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1.5px solid rgba(232, 168, 96, 0.16); border-radius: 22px; padding: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 24px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35); color: #fff9f0; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; } .ds-eyebrow { font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #e8a860; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; color: #d4c4b0; line-height: 1.6; font-size: 0.95rem; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Auth and form input on dark warm background.
components.css: .ds-field-label { display: block; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #fff9f0; } .ds-input { width: 100%; margin-top: 0.35rem; border-radius: 14px; border: 1.5px solid rgba(232, 168, 96, 0.16); background: rgba(31, 24, 20, 0.72); padding: 0.85rem 1rem; color: #fff9f0; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(232, 168, 96, 0.45); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(232, 168, 96, 0.1); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-nav-link { color: #a89480; padding: 0.65rem 0.9rem; border-radius: 999px; text-decoration: none; font-family: Manrope, ui-sans-serif, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; transition: transform 360ms cubic-bezier(0.37, 0, 0.2, 1), background 360ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 360ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: rgba(255, 200, 140, 0.08); color: #fff9f0; } .ds-nav-link-active { background: rgba(232, 168, 96, 0.16); color: #fff9f0; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(232, 168, 96, 0.2); }

narrative.overview: Heartstrings Club looks and feels like a cozy illustrated room at sunset — warm terracotta walls, sage-green accents, cream paper, soft grain, and hand-drawn SVG environments. The UI is a product surface wrapped in a nostalgic, lo-fi illustration style.
keyCharacteristics: Warm earthy palette on deep brown backgrounds
Rounded organic containers with soft warm shadows

rules.name: The Warm Tint Rule
rules.body: Never use pure #000 or #fff. All neutrals are tinted toward terracotta or cream.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Golden amber carries emphasis on ≤15% of any screen.

rules.name: The Serif-for-Emotion Rule
rules.body: Headlines use serif; functional UI stays in Manrope.

rules.name: The Flat-Grain Rule
rules.body: Texture adds depth; avoid stacking multiple blur layers decoratively.

dos: Do use warm earthy CSS variables from :root
Do add subtle grain textures and golden-hour glows
Do use Framer Motion with spring tokens from lib/motion.js
Do use inline SVG icons, never emoji as UI icons
donts: Don't use generic SaaS landing patterns
Don't use cold clinical white or corporate cyan accents
Don't use glassmorphism as default decoration
Don't use pure black or pure white
Don't use modal-first flows when inline works
